disjointness.caveat: LR12 is structurally disjoint from LR11 but its prior aggregate result is known; it is score evidence, not a pristine promotion held-out set.

oracle_warning: Score correction coefficients and ORACLE_TOP_ERROR selectors use teacher state. Payload BPW is an exact oracle accounting, never an inference candidate.

terminal_criteria.downstream_minimum: layer3 rescue_mean>=0.90 AND rescue_ci95_low>=0.80 AND route_matches>=baseline
terminal_criteria.saturation: two successive rank/precision doublings add <0.01 rescue
